---
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    css: ../course-outline.css
    slide-number: true
    center: false
    margin: 0.05
    footer: "<a href='javascript:history.back()'>← Back</a>"
---

```{=html}
<section class="slide level2">
<h2>VII. Jesus Baptizes with the Holy Spirit</h2>

<details>
  <summary><strong>A. Overview</strong></summary>
  <details>
    <summary class="lv-1">1. Introduction</summary>
    <div class="lv-lc">a. <a href="https://bibleproject.com/videos/holy-spirit/" target="_blank">Holy Spirit — Bible Project</a></div>
  </details>
</details>

</section>
```
